steps.name: Given I have an admin API token
When I create a plant using the full Swagger example body under category 5
Then the API response status should not be 500
steps.message: DEFECT API_POST_PLT_ADM_007: Backend returned 500 Internal Server Error when receiving the Swagger-documented optional fields (id, nested category). Client input must never cause the server to crash; expected 4xx, got 500. did not expect [500] but found [500]
